zh.Stockport, Cheshire County, England, Uni: 英國英格蘭爾斯托普特
zh.Knutsford, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾可努恰福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John de Baguley Bigelow於1452年出生在英國英格蘭爾奧勒頓時，他的父親Sir William II de Bigelow Baguley22歲，母親Clementia De Chedale24歲。他於1473年11月7日與Ellen D Biloxham在英國英格蘭爾奧勒頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1533年在他的家鄉享年82歲。

zh-hans.Stockport, Cheshire County, England, Uni: 英国英格兰爾斯托普特
zh-hans.Knutsford, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾可努恰福德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John de Baguley Bigelow于1452年出生在英国英格兰爾奧勒頓时，他的父亲Sir William II de Bigelow Baguley22岁，母亲Clementia De Chedale24岁。他于1473年11月7日与Ellen D Biloxham在英国英格兰爾奧勒頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1533年在他的家乡享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Baguley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Baguley (Cheshire). The placename is from Old English bagga denoting an unidentified animal, perhaps the badger, + lēah ‘wood, clearing’. Compare Bagley .

variants.name: Bagley
meanings: English: habitational name from Baguley in Cheshire or from any of several places called Bagley, in Devon, Gloucestershire, Shropshire, Somerset, and Yorkshire. These get their names either from the Old English personal name Bacga + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ or from an unattested Old English word, bagga, for a ‘bag-shaped’ object or creature + lēah.

nameMeanings.name: Bigelow
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English or Irish: perhaps a variant of English   Bigley   or Irish   Begley  .

variants.name: Biglow
meanings: English or Irish: variant of   Bigelow  .

variants.name: Bigley
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Bickley   or   Beckley  , with voicing of /k/ to /g/.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John de Baguley Bigelow was born in 1452, in Ollerton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William II de Bigelow Baguley, was 22 and his mother, Clementia De Chedale, was 24. He married Ellen D Biloxham on 7 November 1473, in Ollerton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died about 1533, in his hometown, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John de Baguley Bigelow est né en 1452, à Ollerton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William II de Bigelow Baguley, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Clementia De Chedale, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Ellen D Biloxham le 7 novembre 1473, à Ollerton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé environ 1533, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John de Baguley Bigelow 1452 in Ollerton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William II de Bigelow Baguley 22 und seine Mutter Clementia De Chedale 24. Er hat am 7. November 1473 in Ollerton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Ellen D Biloxham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb um 1533 im Alter von 82 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Baguley Bigelow è nato il nel 1452 nel Ollerton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir William II de Bigelow Baguley, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Clementia De Chedale, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Ellen D Biloxham il 7 novembre 1473, nel Ollerton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì circa 1533, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John de Baguley Bigelowが1452年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアオラートンで生まれた時，父Sir William II de Bigelow Baguleyは22歳，母Clementia De Chedaleは24歳であった。1473年11月7日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアオラートンでEllen D Biloxhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は約1533年に故郷で82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John de Baguley Bigelow(이)가 1452년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 레르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William II de Bigelow Baguley(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Clementia De Chedale(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1473년 11월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 레르턴에서 Ellen D Biloxham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1533년 그의 고향에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John de Baguley Bigelow nasceu em 1452, em Ollerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William II de Bigelow Baguley, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Clementia De Chedale, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellen D Biloxham em 7 de novembro de 1473, em Ollerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1533, em sua cidade natal, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John de Baguley Bigelow родился в 1452 г. в местности оллиртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William II de Bigelow Baguley было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Clementia De Chedale, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen D Biloxham 7 ноября 1473 г. в местности оллиртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер около 1533 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John de Baguley Bigelow nació en 1452, en Ollerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William II de Bigelow Baguley, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Clementia De Chedale, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Ellen D Biloxham el 7 de noviembre de 1473, en Ollerton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1533, en su pueblo, a la edad de 82 años.
